layer.origins.origin.name: Race
layer.origins.origin.missing_origin.name: No Race
layer.origins.origin.missing_origin.desc: You have not yet chosen a race.
origin.runic_races.human.name: Human (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.human.description: Humans live as though the world subtly bends around them, turning coincidence into opportunity. They are adaptable generalists with steady luck and a stubborn refusal to fall, but possess no overt supernatural gift.
origin.runic_races.halfling.name: Halfling (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.halfling.description: Halflings are small, nimble, and preternaturally fortunate. They move through danger as though luck itself shields them, excelling at quick escapes, light steps, and impossible survivals.
origin.runic_races.nomad.name: Nomad (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.nomad.description: Nomads are desert-hardened wanderers shaped by endurance and open sky. They move fastest across dry lands, weather hunger well, and burst forward with the certainty of travelers who always know the next step.
origin.runic_races.giant_blooded.name: Giant-Blooded (Mortal)
origin.runic_races.giant_blooded.descrip: Giant-Blooded are towering half-giants defined by overwhelming presence. Their reach exceeds all others and their resilience is immense, but their size makes subtlety impossible.
origin.runic_races.high_elf.name: High Elf (Fae)
origin.runic_races.high_elf.description: High Elves are ancient arcanists who breathe magic as naturally as air. Arcane force comes easily to them and magic can be turned back upon the careless, but cold iron burns their essence and weakens their craft.
origin.runic_races.wood_elf.name: Wood Elf (Fae)
origin.runic_races.wood_elf.description: Wood Elves walk in balance with the living world. Leaves hold their weight, forests quicken their step, and the green earth mends their wounds. Fire is their bane, and stone depths feel like exile.
origin.runic_races.sprite.name: Sprite (Fae)
origin.runic_races.sprite.description: Sprites are diminutive fae beings of extraordinary speed and fragility. They drift on wind, slip through gaps no other race can pass, and carry music further than any mortal — but a strong blow can shatter them.
origin.runic_races.changeling.name: Changeling (Fae)
origin.runic_races.changeling.descriptio: Changelings exist between identities, wearing faces as others wear masks. They read the nature of those around them and bend perception to their will. The gods distrust what they cannot pin down.
origin.runic_races.dryad.name: Dryad (Fae)
origin.runic_races.dryad.description: Dryads are rooted in the living world — photosynthetic, patient, and territorial. Sunlight heals them, their presence mends allies, and poison cannot touch them. But fire consumes them utterly, and darkness starves their soul.
origin.runic_races.wolfkin.name: Wolfkin (Beast)
origin.runic_races.wolfkin.description: Wolfkin experience the world through scent and instinct. They run with tireless endurance and fight strongest alongside their pack, but silvered wounds and relentless undead leave deep scars.
origin.runic_races.dragonborn.name: Dragonborn (Beast)
origin.runic_races.dragonborn.descriptio: Dragonborn carry draconic fire in their blood. Scales grant them natural armor and their breath is a devastating weapon, but their power comes with a heavier frame and a blunt, martial nature.
origin.runic_races.catfolk.name: Catfolk (Beast)
origin.runic_races.catfolk.description: Catfolk perceive space as something fluid. They always land on their feet, see clearly in shadow, and strike with supernatural speed. Nine lives protect them from the first killing blow — but water terrifies them and heavy armor is anathema.
origin.runic_races.minotaur.name: Minotaur (Beast)
origin.runic_races.minotaur.description: Minotaurs are unstoppable once in motion. Raw force empowers their blows and they sense the layout of labyrinths by instinct, but their bulk makes them impossible to miss.
origin.runic_races.serpentfolk.name: Serpentfolk (Beast)
origin.runic_races.serpentfolk.descripti: Serpentfolk are cold-blooded ambush predators who see the world through venom and patience. Every strike carries poison, and they can shed afflictions like dead skin. But cold saps their strength and fire chars their scales.
origin.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.name: Mountain Dwarf (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.descri: Mountain Dwarves see in darkness, mine faster than any race, and judge ore quality at a glance. Their forge-blessed hands can coax rare properties from crafted items. But open sky unsettles them and arcane study resists their stubborn minds.
origin.runic_races.deep_dwarf.name: Deep Dwarf (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.deep_dwarf.descriptio: Deep Dwarves have adapted to the abyss itself. Mining Fatigue cannot touch them and they sense every creature that walks the deep earth, but sunlight scorches their flesh and the surface slows them to misery.
origin.runic_races.goblin.name: Goblin (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.goblin.description: Goblins see treasure where others see trash. They wear more accessories than any other race, luck follows their grasping hands, and quick reflexes keep them alive, but their bodies are frail.
origin.runic_races.troll.name: Troll (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.troll.description: Trolls regenerate from almost anything, shrug off wither, and possess more raw vitality than any race alive. But fire strips their healing, magic confounds their simple minds, and the enchanting table is a closed book to them.
origin.runic_races.kobold.name: Kobold (Underfolk)
origin.runic_races.kobold.description: Kobolds see the hidden workings of the world — every redstone wire, every trap mechanism. They set invisible snares, thrive in tight spaces, and demolish structures with frightening efficiency. Open ground is their greatest fear.
origin.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.name: Wyvern-Blooded (Dragon)
origin.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.descri: Wyvern-Blooded glide on currents of wind and strike from above with devastating force. Their eyes see farther from height, and their tail answers attacks from behind. But underground spaces crush their spirit, and wet wings do not fly.
origin.runic_races.elder_drake.name: Elder Drake (Dragon)
origin.runic_races.elder_drake.descripti: Elder Drakes are ancient dragons in mortal form. Fire cannot touch them, their roar crushes lesser creatures, and ancient wrath rises when they are pressed, but they learn slowly and scorn lesser treasures.
origin.runic_races.vampire.name: Vampire (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.vampire.description: Vampires rule the night - faster, stronger, and driven by blood hunger. They bend weak minds to their will, but sunlight is death, holy magic is agony, and daylight leaves them diminished.
origin.runic_races.lycanthrope.name: Lycanthrope (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.lycanthrope.descripti: Lycanthropes carry the beast within. When blood flows and death draws near, the wolf erupts - stronger, faster, and harder to kill, but more difficult to control. Silver is their eternal bane.
origin.runic_races.revenant.name: Revenant (Cursed)
origin.runic_races.revenant.description: Revenants died once and refused to stay dead. They rise where they fall, command the loyalty of the grave, and endure what would destroy the living. But healing is muted in their dead flesh, and the sun denies them rest.
power.runic_races.human.determination.de: Triggered when reduced below 30% HP. Grants Absorption III and Regeneration I for 6 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.human.adaptive_learnin: Grants +1 Luck and +5% movement speed, representing human adaptability.
power.runic_races.human.universal_palate: Grants +1 max heart representing robust human constitution.
power.runic_races.halfling.lucky_dodge.d: 10% chance to completely evade an attack. 30-second cooldown between dodges.
power.runic_races.halfling.lightfoot.des: Press primary active key to become invisible for 5 seconds. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.halfling.small_stature: Fall damage reduced by 30%. Movement speed increased by 10%.
power.runic_races.halfling.high_metaboli: Hunger depletes 25% faster due to high metabolism.
power.runic_races.nomad.sand_shield.name: Sand Shield
power.runic_races.nomad.sand_shield.desc: When hit, gain Resistance I for 2 seconds. 20-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.nomad.pathfinders_mark: Press primary active key to surge forward with a burst of speed. Grants Speed II for 3 seconds. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.nomad.desert_stride.de: Grants +10% movement speed and +1 armor from desert-hardened resilience.
power.runic_races.nomad.cold_vulnerabili: Take +25% freeze damage. Suffer -5% movement speed at night due to cold sensitivity.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.earthsha: Take 50% less fall damage. Your massive frame absorbs the impact.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.towering: Grants +4 max health (2 hearts), full knockback immunity, and +20% entity interaction reach.
power.runic_races.giant_blooded.lumberin: Suffer -15% movement speed and +25% food exhaustion due to massive frame.
power.runic_races.high_elf.arcane_reflex: When struck by magical damage, gain Regeneration II and Speed I for 3 seconds. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.high_elf.mana_attuneme: Grants +15% magic damage, night vision, but -2 max hearts. Represents an innate magical attunement at the cost of physical frailty.
power.runic_races.high_elf.iron_sensitiv: Take +15% increased physical damage. Represents elven sensitivity to iron and mundane weaponry.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.thornguard.de: When hit, thorns retaliate for 1 damage to the attacker. 5-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.canopy_meld.d: Press primary active key to become invisible for 10 seconds. Nearby entities within 16 blocks gain Glowing. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.forest_stride: Grants +15% movement speed and slow passive health regeneration (1 HP every 5 seconds). Represents natural forest agility and nature's embrace.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.fire_vulnerab: Take +25% increased fire damage. Wood elves are especially vulnerable to flames.
power.runic_races.sprite.phase_shift.des: When hit for 4+ hearts, become invulnerable for 1 second (Resistance V). 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_drift.name: Fae Drift
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_drift.descr: Permanent Slow Falling and +30% movement speed. Sprites drift gracefully through the air.
power.runic_races.sprite.diminutive_fram: Grants +15% attack speed. Tiny frame allows faster strikes.
power.runic_races.sprite.fragile_essence: Suffer -6 max health (3 hearts) and greatly increased knockback received. Sprites are fragile beings.
power.runic_races.changeling.mirror_form: When hit by an entity, gain Strength I and Speed I for 10 seconds. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.changeling.assume_form: Press primary active key to become invisible with Speed I for 6 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.changeling.elusive_nat: Grants +10% movement speed and night vision. Changelings can read the nature of others and move unseen.
power.runic_races.changeling.divine_dist: Suffer -2 max health (1 heart) and reduced luck. The gods distrust those who wear many faces.
power.runic_races.dryad.bark_skin.name: Bark Skin
power.runic_races.dryad.bark_skin.descri: When below 40% HP, gain Resistance I for 6 seconds. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dryad.overgrowth.name: Overgrowth
power.runic_races.dryad.overgrowth.descr: Press primary active key to gain Regeneration II for 5 seconds and grant Regeneration I to nearby players within 5 blocks. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dryad.photosynthesis.d: Heal 1 HP every 15 seconds when exposed to sunlight during the day. Immune to poison.
power.runic_races.dryad.wooden_bane.name: Wooden Bane
power.runic_races.dryad.wooden_bane.desc: Take triple fire damage (+200%). Suffer -5% movement speed.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.pack_howl.name: Pack Howl
power.runic_races.wolfkin.pack_howl.desc: On hitting a mob, nearby players within 16 blocks gain Speed I for 3 seconds. 15-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.predators_rush: Press primary active key to dash forward with a burst of speed. Grants Speed II for 2 seconds. 30-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.keen_senses.de: Permanent night vision and +15% movement speed. The wolf's senses are always sharp.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.silver_bane.de: Take +20% physical damage and suffer -2 armor. Heavy armor chafes against your wild nature.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.draconic_fu: When below 30% HP, unleash a fire burst dealing 2 hearts in a 3-block radius and igniting targets for 3 seconds. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.dragon_brea: Press primary active key to unleash dragon breath. Nearby living creatures in a 5-block radius take 3 hearts of fire damage and ignite for 8 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.scaled_hide: Grants +4 natural armor and 50% fire damage resistance. Draconic scales harden your body against flame and steel.
power.runic_races.dragonborn.draconic_bu: Suffer +25% hunger drain, -10% attack speed, and -2 hearts max health. The dragon's power demands a heavy toll.
power.runic_races.catfolk.nine_lives.des: The first lethal blow instead leaves you at 1 heart, grants Resistance V for 2 seconds and Regeneration II for 3 seconds, then goes on a 10-minute cooldown.
power.runic_races.catfolk.pounce.name: Pounce
power.runic_races.catfolk.pounce.descrip: Press primary active key to leap forward and upward. Grants Strength I for 3 seconds on landing. 45-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.catfolk.feline_grace.d: Take 70% less fall damage, permanent night vision, and +15% attack speed. Cats always land on their feet.
power.runic_races.catfolk.water_aversion: Take +30% damage while submerged in water and suffer -2 hearts max health. Catfolk despise getting wet.
power.runic_races.minotaur.bullrush.name: Bullrush
power.runic_races.minotaur.bullrush.desc: Deal +25% physical melee damage. The minotaur's raw strength is unmatched.
power.runic_races.minotaur.labyrinthine_: Press primary active key to gain Night Vision and reveal all living entities within 30 blocks with Glowing for 15 seconds. 300-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.minotaur.unstoppable_m: Grants +3 hearts max health and 50% knockback resistance. The minotaur's mass is nearly immovable.
power.runic_races.minotaur.clumsy_hooves: Suffer -1 heart max health, -5% movement speed, and +15% hunger drain. The minotaur's bulk is cumbersome.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.venomstrik: Apply Poison II for 2 seconds on every melee hit.
Press primary active key to shed your skin, removing Poison, Wither, Weakness, Slowness, and Mining Fatigue. Grants Resistance V for 3 seconds. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.cold_blood: Immune to Poison, +10% movement speed, and permanent night vision. Serpentfolk thrive in darkness.
power.runic_races.serpentfolk.cold_vulne: Take +50% freeze damage, +15% fire damage, and suffer -1 heart max health. Cold-blooded physiology has its costs.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.stonewa: When hit, gain Resistance I for 1.5 seconds, reducing damage by ~15%. 10-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.darkvis: Grants permanent night vision and +15% block break speed representing practiced dwarven mining.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.forge_h: Grants +2 armor and +2 hearts from forge-hardened constitution.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.surface: While exposed to the open sky, suffer -5% movement speed and +15% exhaustion gain. Dwarves are uncomfortable on the surface.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.tremorsense: Grants permanent night vision. Every 5 seconds, nearby living entities within 12 blocks gain Glowing, representing tremorsense detection.
Press primary active key to gain Haste III for 10 seconds, vastly increasing mining speed. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.abyssal_ada: Immune to Mining Fatigue and grants +2 hearts from deep dwarf resilience.
power.runic_races.deep_dwarf.photosensit: Take 0.5 hearts per second in direct sunlight during daytime. Suffer -5% movement speed from surface discomfort.
power.runic_races.goblin.scatter.name: Scatter
power.runic_races.goblin.scatter.descrip: When hit, gain Speed III and Invisibility for 1 second as an evasion burst. 20-second cooldown.
Grants +2 luck for better loot and permanent night vision representing treasure-seeking instincts.
Grants +20% attack speed for fast stabbing and +10% movement speed from goblin agility.
power.runic_races.goblin.fragile_alone.d: Suffer -2 hearts max health and take +15% damage from all sources. Goblins are physically frail despite their cunning.
power.runic_races.troll.regrowth.name: Regrowth
power.runic_races.troll.regrowth.descrip: Regeneration I while above 50% HP. Below 25% HP, upgrades to Regeneration III for 8 seconds. 120-second cooldown on the upgrade.
power.runic_races.troll.thick_hide.name: Thick Hide
power.runic_races.troll.thick_hide.descr: Grants +4 hearts, +2 armor, and immunity to the Wither effect. Trolls are incredibly tough.
power.runic_races.troll.fire_bane.name: Fire Bane
power.runic_races.troll.fire_bane.descri: Take double damage from all fire sources (onFire, inFire, lava). Fire is the bane of troll-kind.
power.runic_races.troll.dull_mind.name: Dull Mind
power.runic_races.troll.dull_mind.descri: Suffer -10% movement speed, -15% attack speed, and -30% magic damage dealt. Trolls are slow and dim-witted.
power.runic_races.kobold.tunnel_rat.name: Tunnel Rat
power.runic_races.kobold.tunnel_rat.desc: While beneath cover and away from open sky, gain +15% movement speed and +10% attack speed.
power.runic_races.kobold.improvised_trap: Press primary active key to spring a trap: deal 3 damage and apply Slowness III for 4 seconds to entities within 3 blocks. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.kobold.demolitions_exp: Grants +1 attack damage from trap and explosive expertise, and +1 armor from scrappy kobold protection.
power.runic_races.kobold.exposed_weaknes: Suffer -3 hearts max health and take +20% damage when exposed to the sky. Kobolds are vulnerable in open areas.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.tailstr: When hit, your tail lashes out dealing 2 hearts of damage back to the attacker. 10-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.updraft: Press primary active key to launch 15 blocks upward. Grants Strength II for 5 seconds and Slow Falling for 10 seconds. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.windbor: Permanent slow falling, 70% fall damage reduction, and +10% movement speed. The wind carries you gently.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.claustr: When denied open sky, suffer -2 hearts max health and -5% movement speed. Wyvern-blooded thrive in the open air.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.ancient_wr: When hit, gain Strength II for 10 seconds (+25% damage). 60-second cooldown. Ancient rage fuels your strikes.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.primordial: Press primary active key to roar. Nearby living creatures within 8 blocks receive Slowness IV and Weakness II for 5 seconds. You gain Strength I for 10 seconds but are briefly slowed. 180-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.draconic_c: Grants +3 hearts max health, +3 natural armor, and complete fire immunity. The ancient drake's body is nearly indestructible.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.ancient_pr: Suffer -2 luck, -10% movement speed, and +20% hunger drain. An ancient body demands much and moves deliberately.
power.runic_races.vampire.blood_frenzy.d: When below 50% HP, enter blood frenzy: Strength II and Regeneration II for 6 seconds. 90-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.vampire.mesmerize.name: Mesmerize
power.runic_races.vampire.mesmerize.desc: Press primary active key to mesmerize. Nearby living creatures within 8 blocks receive Weakness II and Slowness III for 10 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.vampire.nocturnal_pred: Permanent night vision and +15% movement speed. At night, deal +20% damage. The darkness is your domain.
power.runic_races.vampire.solar_anathema: Take 1 heart per second in direct sunlight, suffer -2 hearts max health, and take +30% magic damage. The sun is your bane.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.transforma: When below 30% HP, transform into beast form for 30 seconds: Strength III, Speed II, Resistance I, but Mining Fatigue III. 60-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.howl_of_th: Press primary active key to howl. Nearby players within 16 blocks and yourself gain Strength I for 10 seconds. 120-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.heightened: Permanent night vision, +10% movement speed, and +0.5 hearts attack damage. The beast's senses are always sharp.
power.runic_races.lycanthrope.silver_ban: Take +20% physical damage and suffer -1 heart max health. Silver and steel bite deep into cursed flesh.
power.runic_races.revenant.deathless_spi: When at or below 25% HP, gain Strength II and Resistance I for 5 seconds. 60-second cooldown. Spite fuels your fading body.
power.runic_races.revenant.grave_call.de: Press primary active key to summon two Grave Servants (armored zombies with iron swords). 300-second cooldown.
Immune to Wither effect, +2 hearts max health, and +2 natural armor. Death has already claimed you once.
All healing reduced by 50%, take 0.5 hearts every 5 seconds in direct sunlight, and suffer -1 heart max health. Your flesh resists restoration.
power.runic_races.mountain_dwarf.biome_a: Stronger in mountains, weakened at sea.
power.runic_races.wood_elf.biome_affinit: Empowered in forests, weakened in heat.
power.runic_races.nomad.biome_affinity.d: Faster in dry lands, slowed by cold.
power.runic_races.wolfkin.biome_affinity: At home in taigas, uncomfortable in deserts.
power.runic_races.vampire.nocturnal_scal: Stronger at night, weaker during the day.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.biome_a: Empowered on mountain peaks, weakened underground.
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_wings.name: Fae Wings
power.runic_races.sprite.fae_wings.descr: Gossamer wings grant elytra-style flight. Tap secondary active to flap upward while airborne. 1.5-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.wyvern_blooded.wyvern_: Leathery wings grant elytra-style flight. Tap secondary active to flap upward while airborne. 3-second cooldown.
power.runic_races.elder_drake.ancient_wi: Massive draconic wings grant elytra-style flight. Tap secondary active to flap upward while airborne. 5-second cooldown.
